choice: USD-only with US federal + flat state tax
rationale: Prior 9a5db500 explicitly defines the v1 tax model as US progressive federal brackets (MFJ default, configurable filing status, standard deduction) with a single flat configurable state rate — this is unambiguously a US-jurisdiction model denominated in USD. Prior 1306ca6a establishes self-deployability with no hard-coded values, meaning non-US deployers can zero out the state rate and effectively ignore federal brackets, but the model itself is USD/US. Together these two priors resolve the question: v1 is USD-only with US federal + flat state tax, with zeroing out as the documented workaround for non-US deployers.
